howItWorks.subtitle: Our platform makes global shopping and earning while traveling simple and secure

step1.title: Sign Up
step1.desc: Create an account as a Traveler or a Shopper

step2.title: Connect & Request
step2.desc: Shoppers request items, Travelers accept requests that align with their travel plans

step3.title: Secure Payment
step3.desc: Safe transactions with payment held until delivery confirmation

step4.title: Delivery & Review
step4.desc: Traveler delivers the item and both parties leave reviews

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to commonly asked questions about our platform

items.q: How do I get started as a traveler?
items.a: Sign up and complete your profile to start receiving requests.
Payments are held until delivery confirmation to protect both parties.

items.q: What if the item I receive is damaged?
items.a: You can open a dispute; our support team will review the case.

items.q: Can I request any item from anywhere in the world?
items.a: Yes, depending on availability and local restrictions.

items.q: How do I communicate with the traveler/shopper?
items.a: You can chat directly through the platform messaging system.

items.q: Are there any fees to use the platform?
items.a: Basic usage is free, but service fees may apply.

testimonials.title: What Our Community Says
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied travelers and shoppers from around the globe

items.name: Alex Johnson
items.text: I've been able to fund my travels across Asia by fulfilling shopping requests. Not only do I earn extra cash, but I also meet interesting people along the way.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.text: Cobagage helped me get authentic French skincare products at a fraction of the import cost. The traveler even shared tips on how to use them!

items.name: Carlos Mendez
items.text: As a frequent business traveler, I've turned my trips into opportunities to earn extra income while helping others access products from Spain.
